description: Unique identifier of the campaign. Joins to basic_campaign.campaign_id.
Timestamp of when this campaign record was last updated; part of primary key.
Facebook Ad Account ID associated with the campaign.
Original parent campaign ID used for tracking duplicated campaigns.
Bidding strategy applied (e.g., lowest cost, cost cap).
ID of the post or page boosted by the campaign.
Indicates if Facebook auto-balanced budget across ad sets.
Remaining budget amount at the time of this snapshot.
Campaign buying method such as AUCTION or RESERVED.
Whether the campaign is eligible for a brand-lift study.
Indicates if a spend cap can be applied.
Status manually set by the advertiser (e.g., ACTIVE, PAUSED, ARCHIVED).
Date and time when the campaign was originally created.
Daily allocated spend for this campaign.
System-determined delivery status.
Indicates if SKAdNetwork measurement is enabled.
Last time the budget was modified.
Total lifetime spend limit for the campaign.
Human-readable campaign name.
Marketing objective selected for the campaign (e.g., OUTCOME_TRAFFIC, LINK_CLICKS, OUTCOME_LEADS, OUTCOME_AWARENESS, OUTCOME_ENGAGEMENT, BRAND_AWARENESS, POST_ENGAGEMENT, MESSAGES).
Promotion type assigned for smart campaigns.
Category indicating restricted ad types (e.g., EMPLOYMENT, housing, credit).
Maximum spend allowed for the campaign.
Campaign start date/time.
Status returned by Facebook API.
Time when the campaign was stopped or scheduled to end.
Internal topline identifier used for campaign grouping.
Pacing configuration such as standard or accelerated.
Additional list of applicable special ad categories.
Countries where special ad rules apply.
ID of the app promoted by the campaign.
ID of the custom conversion used.
Custom event name linked to the promotion.
Type of custom event used (e.g., PURCHASE).
ID of the promoted Facebook event.
Store or landing page URL for the promoted object.
ID of the offer used in the campaign.
Offline conversions dataset ID.
Facebook Page ID promoted by the campaign.
Pixel aggregation behavior.
Pixel ID used for conversion tracking.
Pixel firing rules configured for this campaign.
Place Page Set ID for location-based ads.
Catalog ID used for dynamic ads.
Product set used for product-focused ads.
Retention duration set for promoted objects.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
